description: Defense pattern schema from Symbolic-Defense-Protocol. Defines detection types for parasitic override (CORDYCEPS), truth sensor triggers, and escalation pathways. Shape-anchored: SHAPE.TETRA for activation energy, SHAPE.CUBE for containment boundaries.

defense_pattern_types.name: CORDYCEPS Detection
defense_pattern_types.description: Detects parasitic override of autonomous decision-making. Named after the fungus that hijacks insect behavior.

defense_pattern_types.name: Truth Sensor
defense_pattern_types.description: Validates claims against physics constraints and empirical evidence. Rejects unfalsifiable assertions.

defense_pattern_types.name: Escalation Protocol
defense_pattern_types.description: Graduated response to detected threats. Containment first, then active defense.

SHAPE.TETRA.defense_function: Minimum energy required to trigger a defense response. Prevents false positives by requiring threshold breach.

SHAPE.CUBE.defense_function: Structural boundary that isolates detected threats. Six-face closure ensures no leakage path.
